target_name: SolaceAGI API — Invalid Bearer token returns 401 not 500
context: OWASP A2: Broken Authentication. James Bach: a server that returns 500 on invalid token is leaking internal auth logic. Must return 401 Unauthorized. Adversarial spec — sends a plausible-looking but fake Bearer token. The server must reject gracefully, not crash. Fail-closed rule: no compute without valid auth.
